import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const trips = [ { id: 1, name: 'Tokyo Adventure', destination: 'Japan', dates: 'Mar 15 – Mar 22', status: 'active', budget: '$2,450', travelers: 2, progress: 68, emoji: '🏯', gradient: 'from-red-400 to-orange-500' }, { id: 2, name: 'Bali Getaway', destination: 'Indonesia', dates: 'May 1 – May 10', status: 'planning', budget: '$1,800', travelers: 4, progress: 35, emoji: '🌴', gradient: 'from-teal-400 to-emerald-500' }, { id: 3, name: 'Paris Romance', destination: 'France', dates: 'Jun 20 – Jun 27', status: 'planning', budget: '$3,200', travelers: 2, progress: 15, emoji: '🗼', gradient: 'from-blue-400 to-indigo-500' }, ]; const upcomingActivities = [ { icon: '✈️', text: 'Flight to Tokyo booked', time: '2 hours ago', type: 'booking' }, { icon: '🏨', text: 'Hotel checkin in 3 days', time: '1 day ago', type: 'alert' }, { icon: '📝', text: 'Itinerary updated for Day 3', time: '2 days ago', type: 'update' }, { icon: '💰', text: 'Budget updated: +$200 for food', time: '3 days ago', type: 'budget' }, ]; export default function Dashboard() { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [activeTrip, setActiveTrip] = useState(trips[0]); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/'); }; return (
{/* Sidebar */}
✈
TripNest
{[ { icon: '🏠', label: 'Dashboard', active: true }, { icon: '🗺️', label: 'My Trips' }, { icon: '📅', label: 'Itinerary' }, { icon: '💰', label: 'Budget' }, { icon: '📍', label: 'Destinations' }, { icon: '👥', label: 'Travelers' }, { icon: '📄', label: 'Documents' }, { icon: '⚙️', label: 'Settings' }, ].map(({ icon, label, active }) => ( ))}
{user?.name?.[0]?.toUpperCase() || 'U'}

{user?.name || 'Traveler'}

{user?.email || ''}

{/* Main Content */}
{/* Header */}

Welcome back, {user?.name?.split(' ')[0] || 'Traveler'}! 👋

You have {trips.filter(t => t.status === 'active').length} active trip and {trips.filter(t => t.status === 'planning').length} trips in planning

{/* Stats Cards */}
{[ { label: 'Total Trips', value: '12', icon: '🗺️', change: '+2 this year', color: 'from-primary-500 to-emerald-500' }, { label: 'Countries Visited', value: '8', icon: '🌍', change: '+1 this month', color: 'from-blue-500 to-indigo-500' }, { label: 'Total Budget', value: '$7,450', icon: '💰', change: '68% utilized', color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-500' }, { label: 'Travel Days', value: '47', icon: '📅', change: 'This year', color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500' }, ].map((stat) => (
{stat.icon}

{stat.value}

{stat.label}

{stat.change}

))}
{/* Trips List */}

My Trips

{trips.map((trip) => (
setActiveTrip(trip)} className={`p-5 flex items-center gap-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${activeTrip.id === trip.id ? 'bg-primary-50' : ''}`} >
{trip.emoji}

{trip.name}

{trip.status === 'active' ? 'Active' : 'Planning'}

{trip.destination} · {trip.dates}

{trip.progress}%

{trip.budget}

{trip.travelers} travelers

))}
{/* Activity Feed */}

Recent Activity

{upcomingActivities.map((act, i) => (
{act.icon}

{act.text}

{act.time}

))}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

{[ { icon: '🗺️', label: 'Add Destination' }, { icon: '📅', label: 'Plan Day' }, { icon: '💰', label: 'Add Expense' }, { icon: '📄', label: 'Upload Doc' }, ].map(({ icon, label }) => ( ))}
); }
